data.title: U.S. Treasury to Cease Penny Production
data.description:
According to PANews, the U.S. Treasury Department has announced the cessation of penny production. The U.S. Mint has placed its final order for blank pennies, and once these are exhausted, no further production will occur.

The Treasury Department highlighted that there are currently approximately 114 billion pennies in circulation in the United States, with a total value of $11.4 billion. However, the usage of these coins has fallen significantly below expectations. The penny was among the first coins minted by the U.S. Mint following its establishment in 1792.

data.title: James Wynn Initiates High-Leverage Ethereum Position
data.description: According to Foresight News, James Wynn has recently opened a leveraged long position on Ethereum. Utilizing a 25x leverage, Wynn holds 22,548.1 ETH, valued at approximately $60.32 million, with an entry price of $2,671.5 per ETH. This marks the first time Wynn has used leverage on Ethereum with this address.

data.title: Cetus Protocol on Sui Network Hacked and Prices Tank: Everything You Need To Know
data.description:
Cetus Protocol, a leading DEX on the Sui Network, has been hacked, losing at least $200 million. CETUS, SUI, and Sui network meme coins crashed as a result. Here’s everything you need to know about the Cetus Protocol hack. There’s always a first for everything
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/altcoins/cetus-protocol-on-sui-network-hacked-and-prices-tank-everything-you-need-to-know/

data.title: James Wynn starts long ETH, current position worth $60 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain data shows that James Wynn started to open a long position in ETH eight minutes ago, and the current position is worth 60 million US dollars.

data.title: Believe: Canceling the coin issuance review process will prevent pumping projects
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Believe issued an announcement stating that projects submitted through the official website will no longer go through the review process, allowing developers to go online immediately. At the same time, in order to prevent projects that are purely "pumping" or lack actual product progress, the platform will prevent the creators of such projects from obtaining platform fees. This measure will be implemented based on community feedback in the early stage, and it is planned to be enforced natively within the product in the future.
Last night, Believe announced that it is optimizing the platform to improve security and credibility:
1. Due to the surge in non-project tokens, the release of projects on the X account @launchcoin will be temporarily suspended. Developers can submit projects through the official website, and all projects will be manually reviewed and released on a preferential basis.
2. "Verified" will replace the "Featured" label, indicating that the project team has had basic communication with us and has shown an attitude of honesty and integrity. Although it does not represent a full guarantee, it will be reviewed to the best of its ability.

data.title: Cetus: Negotiating with hackers to return assets
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News - The decentralized trading protocol Cetus released an update announcement on X, informing the latest progress of the earlier attack incident. At present, the team has completed the location and repair of the source of the vulnerability, and has cooperated with the Sui team, third-party institutions and anti-cybercrime organizations to track funds and mark hacker wallets, and communicate with law enforcement agencies for assistance.
Cetus said: "The Ethereum wallet address controlled by the hacker involved has been confirmed, and a "white hat settlement plan" has been proposed: If the hacker returns the remaining assets within the time limit, the hacker will be given a bounty reward of 2,324 ETH (about 6 million US dollars) and will no longer be held legally responsible. At present, the community still regards the recovery of damaged assets as its top priority, and the complete report of the incident will be published later."

data.title: Global Liquidity Concerns Rise Amid U.S. and Japan Bond Auctions
data.description:
According to PANews, a recent report by China International Capital Corporation (CICC) suggests that the simultaneous cooling of U.S. and Japanese bond auctions, along with rising interest rates, may indicate a tightening of global liquidity. The report highlights that the insufficient liquidity of the yen, a key financing currency, could exacerbate the simultaneous decline in U.S. stocks, bonds, and the dollar.

The report further warns that with the impending passage of U.S. President Donald Trump's 'one big beautiful bill,' the resolution of the U.S. debt ceiling issue may lead to a concentrated issuance of new U.S. debt by the Treasury between July and September. This could increase the risk of systemic liquidity shocks in the U.S. market. Consequently, the urgency for the Federal Reserve to implement quantitative easing and other balance sheet expansion policies to stabilize the market is growing.

data.title: U.S. Justice Department Investigates Google's AI Deal for Antitrust Violations
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. Department of Justice is investigating whether Google has violated antitrust laws by agreeing to use artificial intelligence technology from a popular chatbot manufacturer. Sources indicate that antitrust enforcement agencies have recently informed Google that they are examining the structure of its deal with Character.AI to determine if it was designed to bypass formal government merger reviews. Under the agreement reached last year, the founders of the chatbot company joined Google, which also received a non-exclusive license to use the technology. A Google spokesperson stated in an email that the company is always willing to respond to regulatory inquiries. They expressed excitement about the addition of Character.AI talent but clarified that Google does not hold equity in the company, which continues to operate independently. Even if the deal does not require formal review, the Justice Department retains the authority to investigate potential anti-competitive behavior. The investigation is currently in its early stages and has not resulted in any allegations of misconduct against Google, and it may ultimately not lead to enforcement action.

data.title: Michigan Legislature Proposes New Cryptocurrency Bills
data.description: According to Odaily, the Michigan legislature has introduced four new bills related to cryptocurrency. These proposals aim to regulate cryptocurrency mining activities, offer tax incentives, permit state treasury investments in Bitcoin and Ethereum, and establish mechanisms for digital asset protection.

data.title: CFTC's Stance on Crypto Perpetuals Signals U.S. Market Clarity
data.description:
CFTC Commissioner Summer Mersinger indicates legality of crypto perpetual futures in the U. S. , potentially impacting major digital assets.
source: https://coincu.com/339203-cftc-crypto-perpetuals-us-market

data.title: Michigan proposes four cryptocurrency bills covering mining, taxation, state fiscal investment, and more
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Michigan State Legislature recently proposed four new cryptocurrency-related bills, covering the regulation of cryptocurrency mining activities, tax exemptions, allowing state finances to invest in Bitcoin and Ethereum, and the establishment of a digital asset protection mechanism. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Trump opponents gather outside Trump dinner to protest
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to the anti-Trump account @Mollyploofkins, Trump opponents gathered outside the Trump National Golf Club in Washington to protest against a dinner held for top TRUMP token holders.

data.title: Ronin Co-founders, Magic Eden Co-founders and others attended Trump's dinner
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Although live broadcasting or carrying video recording equipment is prohibited at this Trump dinner, some participants still posted photos of the dinner on social media. In addition to Justin Sun, Ronin Network co-founder Jihoz.ron, Magic Eden co-founder and CEO Jack Lu, and others also posted about their attendance at the dinner on social media.

data.title: Blockchain Group Increases Bitcoin Holdings with New Purchase
data.description: According to Odaily, Blockchain Group, the first Bitcoin reserve company in Europe, has acquired an additional 227 Bitcoins. This purchase brings the company's total Bitcoin holdings to 847.

data.title: Anthropic Unveils Advanced Programming Models at Developer Conference
data.description: According to PANews, Anthropic has introduced two new models, Claude Opus 4 and Claude Sonnet 4, at a recent developer conference. Claude Opus 4 demonstrated exceptional performance on the SWE-bench validation set, achieving a top score of 72.5%, and reaching 79.4% in high-computing mode, positioning it as a leading global automatic programming model. Claude Sonnet 4 also performed impressively with a score of 72.7%, surpassing OpenAI's o3 and Codex-1 models. Testing by Rakuten revealed that Opus 4 can program continuously for seven hours while efficiently handling complex tasks, setting a new industry benchmark. The new models support parallel tool usage and feature improved memory mechanisms, with Claude Code now fully accessible.

data.title: Ripple News: CTO Weighs In As $237M Transfer Fuels Speculations
data.description:
Over the past 24 hours, Ripple’s native crypto, XRP faced unusual on‐chain activity while its price remained relatively steady. Data from Whale Alert showed about 237. 45 million coins moved between wallets in that period. Despite this large shuffle, XRP price was trading around $2
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/22/ripple-news-cto-weighs-in-as-237m-transfer-fuels-speculations/

data.title: US Senators plan to amend the GENIUS Act to restrict the Trump family from profiting from stablecoins
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Some Democratic senators plan to propose amendments to adjust the ongoing "United States Stablecoin National Innovation Guidance Act (GENIUS Act)" to deal with potential conflicts of interest between former President Trump and his family and cryptocurrency platforms. According to Axios, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and Senators Elizabeth Warren and Jeff Merkley will propose a ban on the US president from making profits through stablecoins. 
Previously, the Trump family was involved in the crypto platform World Liberty Financial and launched the USD1 stablecoin in March. An Abu Dhabi investment institution announced that it would use USD1 to complete a $2 billion Binance investment, sparking Democrats' concerns about potential interest transfers. 
In addition, Merkley and Warren also criticized Trump for hosting a private dinner on May 22 to host a large number of people who bought his personal "stalker coins", calling it "one of the worst corruptions." The incident has now triggered protests from progressive organizations, and Democratic lawmakers have demanded the release of the dinner guest list. (Cointelegraph)
